parameters: She's passed out, but she's still breathing.
We saved the woman who collapsed here, but as soon as she was
healed, she went back to the human world.
She actually went back to her life as a slave. She must really, really
have hated the thought of living with us demons.
Obtained the Secret Shingana's Old Fort Key!
The body of a purged Shingana soldier.
They're the tools the King of Shingana used to torture people.
The body of a purged Shingana soldier.
This is where so many people who stood with Lace were defiled by
that man and forced to pledge their allegiance.
I was one of them. This place was my hell. To think I'd live to see
the day I'd be freed from it.
No matter what anyone says, I'll be forever grateful to the demons.
